scopes.scopeName: Contract, Deterministic Model, And Source-Locked Browser Foundation

tests.description: Extract and execute production validators and model helpers across bounds, non-finite inputs, occupancy clamp, amortization, zero rate, negative result, stable digest, and owner-read omission.
tests.command: node scripts/selftest.mjs

tests.description: Execute production validators against the explicit fixture config/current payload and adversarial fixtures before a production payload exists, requiring exact accepted and rejected PSRM paths.
tests.command: node scripts/validate-palm-springs-rental-market.mjs tests/fixtures/palm-springs-rental-market/current.payload.json tests/fixtures/palm-springs-rental-market/config.json

tests.description: Structurally require the exact private manifest, single-source .npmrc, lockfile v3, exact Playwright graph, trusted registry URLs, integrity hashes, disabled lifecycle scripts, and zero git, file, path, or alternate-source entries.
tests.command: node scripts/validate-node-source-lock.mjs

tests.description: Install only the committed lock graph with browser download and lifecycle scripts disabled, failing on lockfile or registry drift without building or transforming the Pages application.
tests.command: PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_BROWSER_DOWNLOAD=1 npm ci --ignore-scripts

tests.description: Prove npx --no-install resolves the checkout-local Playwright CLI and prints exactly Version 1.61.1 before any browser scenario executes.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright --version

tests.description: Visible missing-config state names the exact failure, makes no payload request, and exposes no substitute output.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-002 missing configuration blocks payload fetch and every output" --reporter=list

tests.description: Visible invalid-payload state names exact errors and exposes no thesis, model result, or numeric publication.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-004 invalid payload produces errors and no conclusion" --reporter=list

tests.description: Visible production output equals the exact bounded occupancy calculation and becomes unavailable for an invalid denominator.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-006 occupancy equation clamps and rejects an invalid denominator" --reporter=list

tests.description: Visible buyer-economics decomposition uses standard amortization and one coherent production result.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-008 buyer economics use standard amortization in one result" --reporter=list

tests.description: Visible zero-rate debt service and cash flow stay finite and explain the straight-line branch.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-009 zero-rate financing stays finite" --reporter=list

scopes.scopeName: Researched Payload And Manual Review Contract

tests.description: Execute production validators over the researched payload, all graphs, six categories, rights, change rules, prompt/runbook contract, restoration path, and no-commit boundary.
tests.command: node scripts/validate-palm-springs-rental-market.mjs

tests.description: Execute production graph, change, classification, and source-rights functions with valid, dangling, cyclic, incompatible, baseline, compared, and inaccessible cases.
tests.command: node scripts/selftest.mjs

tests.description: Production researched payload exposes six truthful categories and no test-fixture authority; actual online research remains separately evidenced.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-001 researched payload exposes six truthful categories and no fixture authority" --reporter=list

tests.description: A valid compared test fixture displays complete grouped change accounting and sourced revision detail.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-013 compared refresh accounts for every material entity" --reporter=list

tests.description: A baseline fixture displays no prior identity, no change records, and no prior-relative directional language.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-014 baseline refresh invents no prior change" --reporter=list

tests.description: An inaccessible source remains attempted and unknown with no eligible support or numeric value.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-015 inaccessible research remains unknown without a value" --reporter=list

tests.description: Execute production view-model, digest, and owner-read helpers for deterministic identity, stale/unavailable omission, safe strings, and repeated output.
tests.command: node scripts/selftest.mjs

tests.description: Validate production page function extraction, payload/config references, fixture paths, prompt/runbook, and strict owner-read contract.
tests.command: node scripts/validate-palm-springs-rental-market.mjs

tests.description: Parse every non-src inline script and require every literal getElementById target to exist.
tests.command: PAGE=palm-springs-rental-market-lab.html node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs");const p=process.env.PAGE;if(!p)throw new Error("PAGE is required");const h=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");const scripts=[...h.matchAll(/<script(?![^>]*\bsrc=)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]).filter(s=>s.trim());if(!scripts.length)throw new Error("no inline script: "+p);scripts.forEach((s,i)=>{try{new Function(s)}catch(e){throw new Error("inline script "+(i+1)+": "+e.message)}});const ids=new Set([...h.matchAll(/\bid=["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const refs=scripts.flatMap(s=>[...s.matchAll(/getElementById\(\s*["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]\s*\)/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const missing=[...new Set(refs.filter(id=>!ids.has(id)))];if(missing.length)throw new Error("missing ids: "+missing.join(", "));console.log("OK page="+p+" inline="+scripts.length+" refs="+refs.length)'

tests.description: Stale status, age, threshold, and owner read remain visible in both modes with no current/live wording.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-003 stale research stays stale in Simple Power and owner read" --reporter=list

tests.description: All levers update dependent visible outputs synchronously, preserve research digest, and cause zero post-boot requests observed without interception.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-005 levers recompute synchronously with zero post-boot requests" --reporter=list

tests.description: Both occupancy values and definitions remain visible with an explicit conflict and no aggregate.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-007 incompatible occupancy definitions remain separate and unaggregated" --reporter=list

tests.description: Negative cash flow stays signed and explicit across Simple, Power, and owner-read receipt with no positive acquisition label.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-010 negative cash flow remains signed and explicit everywhere" --reporter=list

tests.description: Desktop and mobile share digest, truth, outputs, keyboard behavior, layout, nonblank synchronous canvas pixels, and table parity.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-011 desktop mobile Simple Power decisions stay identical" --reporter=list

tests.description: Source dialog exposes complete safe provenance, contains focus, supports Escape/Close, and restores the exact trigger.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-012 source inspector resolves provenance and restores exact focus" --reporter=list

tests.description: Observed, forecast, inference, and user-modeled outputs expose exclusive words, non-color marks, and method/input lineage.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-016 observed forecast inference and modeled outputs stay distinct" --reporter=list

tests.description: Legal capacity, observed active listings, and explicit supply assumptions use separate metric families with no conversion.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-017 legal and active supply remain separate from scenario assumptions" --reporter=list

tests.description: Navigate from index and shared navigation, assert strict current/stale/unavailable owner-read omission and owning deep link, and verify Market Brief ownership.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-018 registered owner read preserves current stale unavailable and omissions" --reporter=list

tests.description: Execute every repository helper and selftest group including Palm Springs production extraction, model, graph, owner read, and registry canaries.
tests.command: node scripts/selftest.mjs

tests.command: node scripts/validate-palm-springs-rental-market.mjs

tests.description: Parse all inline scripts and prove every literal ID reference exists using the repository command.
tests.command: PAGE=palm-springs-rental-market-lab.html node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs");const p=process.env.PAGE;if(!p)throw new Error("PAGE is required");const h=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");const scripts=[...h.matchAll(/<script(?![^>]*\bsrc=)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]).filter(s=>s.trim());if(!scripts.length)throw new Error("no inline script: "+p);scripts.forEach((s,i)=>{try{new Function(s)}catch(e){throw new Error("inline script "+(i+1)+": "+e.message)}});const ids=new Set([...h.matchAll(/\bid=["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const refs=scripts.flatMap(s=>[...s.matchAll(/getElementById\(\s*["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]\s*\)/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const missing=[...new Set(refs.filter(id=>!ids.has(id)))];if(missing.length)throw new Error("missing ids: "+missing.join(", "));console.log("OK page="+p+" inline="+scripts.length+" refs="+refs.length)'

tests.description: Execute every exact Regression SCN-005 title through the real ephemeral static server and same-origin fixture seam.

tests.description: Assert the complete protected scenario/title inventory and all required visible matrix anchors remain executable.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: SCN-005-019 complete Palm Springs protected matrix remains executable" --reporter=list

tests.description: Execute existing Brief contract checks with one Feature 005 owner-read coverage reason and no duplicated market or model content.
tests.command: node scripts/validate-brief-payload.mjs

tests.description: Prove no internal request interception or fulfillment, silent-pass return, skipped/only test, or fixture-as-market-proof pattern remains.
tests.command: grep -nE 'page\.route|context\.route|route\(|fulfill\(|test\.(skip|only)|return;.*(login|missing|unavailable)' tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs
